nodes.name: Append or update row in sheet

parameters.content:
Major gaps: 
1. no X/Twitter implementation in workflow,  - corrected (scrapping from apify, but getting no data)
2. auto-fedow is not clearly real API follow action, - corrected (simulated for now)
3. follow-up is 48-hour logic (not clearly configurable N-day multi-step), - corrected (simulated  followup trigger for 3days / and 7 days)
Major gaps: follow and DM are explicitly simulated; follow-up timing is in test mode (3/7 day checks bypassed); delay values are computed but not enforced by actual wait nodes.

## 🔧 Fixes 3, 4, 5

**Fix 3 — Remove Duplicates node**
Replaces the old Code dedup. Keyed on `platform + username`.

**Fix 4 — Filter (score >= 20)**
Only leads with real signal hit the sheet.
Adjust threshold here if too strict/loose.

**Fix 5 — matchingColumns in Sheets**
Set to `[platform, username]` so re-running doesn't
duplicate existing rows — it UPDATES them instead.

## 🐦 Twitter / X Pipeline

**Fix 2 — Schema Debug + Multi-path Resolution**
`Debug X Schema` node logs raw field keys to execution log.
Run once manually → open execution → check console logs
to confirm which path resolves `username`, `bio`, `followers`.

The normalizer now tries ALL known schema variants:
`d.author?.userName`, `d.user?.screen_name`, `d.userName` etc.
No more `https://twitter.com/undefined` rows.

But there are 0 Twitter rows in your sheet, meaning it hasn't run successfully yet. Needs one manual test run.

## 📸 Instagram Pipeline

**Fix 1 — Profile Enrichment**
Hashtag scraper only returns post data (no bio, no followers).
We now run a second Apify call to `instagram-profile-scraper`
using the collected usernames. This gives us real `biography`
and `followersCount` so scoring actually works.

**Flow:**
Scrape Hashtags → Extract Usernames → Enrich Profiles → Merge → Score

## ✅ P3 — Follow-Back Check (Optimized)

**What this workflow does:**
1. Runs every 2 hours
2. Reads only `status = followed` leads from the sheet
3. **FIXED: 24h gate** — only checks leads followed at least 24h ago (no point checking someone you just followed)
4. Fetches your REAL follower list from Instagram Graph API and/or Twitter API
5. Cross-references: finds who followed you back
6. Skips if nobody new followed back (no wasted writes)
7. Updates sheet: marks `followedBack = true` + timestamps `followedBackAt`

**⚠️ IMPORTANT:** Wire your real Bearer tokens in the two Fetch Followers nodes (IG + X). The matching and sheet-update logic is fully production-ready.

## 🔌 Fetch Real Followers — Instagram

Replace body/URL with your real values:
- `YOUR_IG_USER_ID` → your Instagram Business Account ID
- Credential → Bearer token from Meta Graph API
- This fetches up to 200 of your latest followers

Result is a list of usernames that follow your account.

## 🔌 Fetch Real Followers — X/Twitter

Replace URL with your real values:
- `YOUR_X_USER_ID` → your Twitter numeric user ID
- Credential → Bearer token from Twitter Developer Portal
- This fetches up to 200 of your latest followers

Result is a list of usernames that follow your account.

⚠️ **Replace in both HTTP nodes:**
- `YOUR_IG_HANDLE` → your Instagram username
- `YOUR_X_HANDLE` → your X/Twitter handle

## 🔁 F3 — Follow-Back Check

Runs every **2 hours**.

**Flow:**
1. Fetch all leads with `status = followed` and no `followedBack` yet
2. Pull our live follower lists from IG + X via Apify
3. Cross-reference — any lead now following us back gets flagged
4. Update sheet: `followedBack = true`, `followedBackAt = now`, `status = dm-ready`

> `dm-ready` status is the trigger condition for **F4 — DM Sender**

## 🔁 F3 — Follow-Back Check (Simulation Mode)
**Runs every 2 hours**

1️⃣ Fetch all rows where `status = followed`
2️⃣ Skip anyone already marked `followedBack = true`
3️⃣ **[SIM]** ~60% randomly marked as followed-back
4️⃣ IF matches → write `followedBack`, `followedBackAt`, `status = dm-ready`
5️⃣ IF none → end silently

✅ Column names match sheet exactly: `followedBack` `followedBackAt` (no trailing spaces)

assignments.name: generatedDM
assignments.value: =Hey {{ $json.displayName || $json.username }}, noticed you're in {{ $json.location || 'the space' }} — we help businesses like yours save hours every week with AI automation (lead gen, follow-ups, reporting). Would love to show you what that looks like for your setup. Open to a quick chat?

parameters.content:
## 📤 F4 — DM Sender (Template Mode, Simulation)
**Runs every hour**

1️⃣ Fetch leads with `status = dm-ready` from sheet
2️⃣ Filter out already-sent (`dmSent = true`) + cap at **5 IG + 5 X per hour**
3️⃣ IF no leads → end silently
4️⃣ Loop one-by-one with a **random 5–15s delay** between each send
5️⃣ Apply **template DM** personalised with name + location
6️⃣ **[SIM]** Log DM to console (replace with real API call)
7️⃣ Update sheet: `dmSent`, `dmSentAt`, `generatedDM`, `dmStatus`, `status = dm-sent`

> 🔁 No AI generation — template-based for consistency and speed
> ⚠️ Replace `Simulate DM Send` node with real IG/X API once approved

## 🔁 F5 — Follow-Up Sequence (Template Mode, Simulation)
**Runs every 6 hours**

Fetches all `status = dm-sent` leads, then splits into **2 parallel branches:**

**FU1 Branch (top):**
- Leads with no reply + `followUpStep = 0` + dmSentAt ≥ 3 days ago
- Sends Follow-Up 1 → sets `followUpStep = 1`, `status = fu1-sent`

**FU2 Branch (bottom):**
- Leads with no reply + `followUpStep = 1` + followUp1SentAt ≥ 7 days ago
- Sends Follow-Up 2 → sets `followUpStep = 2`, `status = fu2-sent`

> 🧪 **TEST_MODE = true** in both filter nodes — bypasses time gates for testing
> Set to `false` for production
> ✏️ Edit templates in `Apply FU1 Template` and `Apply FU2 Template` nodes

assignments.name: followUp1DM
assignments.value: =Hey {{ $json.displayName || $json.username }}, just circling back on my last message. We recently helped a similar business automate their lead pipeline and cut manual work by 60%. Would a quick 15-min call make sense to see if it fits your setup?

assignments.name: followUp2DM
assignments.value: =Hey {{ $json.displayName || $json.username }}, no worries if the timing is off — just wanted to leave the door open. If AI automation ever comes back on your radar, feel free to reach out. Happy to help whenever it makes sense.

parameters.content:
## 🚨 F7 — Event Detection: Unfollow & Block (Simulation)
**Runs every 30 minutes**

1️⃣ Fetch all leads where `followedBack = true` (active relationships only)
2️⃣ **[SIM]** Randomly simulate: ~15% unfollow rate, ~5% block rate
3️⃣ Skip anyone already flagged as `unfollowed` or `blocked`
4️⃣ IF no events → end silently
5️⃣ Switch by event type → update Leads sheet accordingly
6️⃣ Append all events to Event Log sheet for audit trail

**Sheet updates:**
- Unfollow → `status = unfollowed`, `followedBack = false`, `dmStatus = unfollow-detected`
- Block → `status = blocked`, `followedBack = false`, `dmStatus = block-detected`

> 🔁 Replace `Simulate Unfollow and Block` with real IG/X API calls once approved
> Production logic: cross-reference our following list vs sheet — missing = unfollow; 404/restricted = block

🔁 **TO GO LIVE — replace simulation node with:**

**Unfollow:** Call IG/X API → get our following list → if lead's username missing = unfollow

**Block:** Call IG/X API → fetch lead's profile → if 404 or access restricted = block
